channel.title: The Register - AI + ML
channel.description: Biting the hand that feeds IT — AI and machine learning coverage.

item.title: Sovereign AI push has nations racing to build domestic compute
item.dc:creator: Tobias Mann
item.description: Governments from the EU to the Gulf are pouring billions into sovereign AI infrastructure, determined to keep models, data, and GPUs within national borders.
item.content:encoded:
Governments from the EU to the Gulf are pouring billions into sovereign AI infrastructure, determined to keep models, data, and GPUs within national borders. Analysts say the trend marks a decisive break from the cloud-centric assumptions of the last decade.

The shift is reshaping procurement, with state-backed clouds demanding on-shore training runs and audited supply chains.

item.title: Open-weights model claims parity with frontier labs at a fraction of the cost
item.dc:creator: Katyanna Quach
item.description: A new open-weights release is the latest to argue that smaller, cheaper models can match the big labs on reasoning benchmarks.
item.content:encoded: A new open-weights release is the latest to argue that smaller, cheaper models can match the big labs on reasoning benchmarks — and it ships under a permissive licence.

item.title: Datacenter power demand from AI training forces grid rethink
item.dc:creator: Dan Robinson
item.description: Utilities warn that the appetite of AI training clusters is outpacing new generation capacity in several regions.
item.content:encoded: Utilities warn that the appetite of AI training clusters is outpacing new generation capacity, pushing operators toward on-site generation and long-term nuclear deals.

item.title: Regulators circle AI agents as autonomous tooling spreads
item.dc:creator: Brandon Vigliarolo
item.description: As agentic systems take actions on users' behalf, lawmakers are weighing liability and audit requirements.
item.content:encoded: As agentic systems take actions on users' behalf, lawmakers are weighing liability and audit requirements for the software that decides and acts.
